case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. FERNANDO VILLADOLID

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT VILLADOLID, FERNANDO , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA 28 KING MART INTERNATIONAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
THIS CASE IS BASED ON THE PENALTY ASSESSMENT ORDER OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLADOLID, FERNANDO , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA 28 KING MART INTERNATIONAL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
